problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Self-assembled. Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
